name: Dashboard Agent
description: Turns natural-language requests into live data visualizations over your Dataverse opportunities and contacts, and publishes them as tiles on your Power Apps dashboard.

conversation_starters.title: Recent opportunities
conversation_starters.text: Show me the value of the 5 most recently created opportunities as a bar chart

conversation_starters.title: Contacts by gender
conversation_starters.text: Create a pie chart of the number of women versus men in the contact database

conversation_starters.title: Open opportunities over time
conversation_starters.text: Open opportunities by month this year as a line chart

conversation_starters.title: My dashboard
conversation_starters.text: What visualizations are currently on my dashboard?
